column1: # KD-only packing queue for spare H100 memory on GPUs 2 and 3.
# Training entries must use teacher-logit KL only. No corpus-token labels.

column4: bash -c 'while [ ! -e runs/analysis_done/kd_lora_kl_hi_e40_v3_qwen36_27b_rag_logit_lens.done ]; do sleep 60; done; mkdir -p runs/analysis_done; .venv/bin/python scripts/analyze.py; .venv/bin/python scripts/current_report.py; .venv/bin/python scripts/report.py; touch runs/analysis_done/final_reports_pack.done'
